top3.sql:
SELECT e.expense_id, e.expense_description, e.expense_date, e.cost, e.approved
FROM expense e
JOIN member m ON e.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.position = 'Vice President';

SELECT e.expense_description, e.expense_date, e.cost
FROM expense e
JOIN member m ON e.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.position = 'Vice President';

SELECT e.expense_id, e.expense_description, e.expense_date, e.cost, e.approved
FROM expense e
JOIN member m ON e.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.position = 'Vice President';

SELECT e.expense_description, e.expense_date, e.cost
FROM expense AS e
INNER JOIN member AS m ON e.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.position = 'Vice President';

SELECT e.expense_description, e.expense_date, e.cost
FROM expense e
JOIN member m ON e.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.position = 'Vice President';

SELECT e.expense_id, e.expense_description, e.expense_date, e.cost, e.approved
FROM expense e
JOIN member m ON e.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.position = 'Vice President';

SELECT e.expense_description, e.expense_date, e.cost
FROM expense AS e
INNER JOIN member AS m ON e.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.position = 'Vice President';

SELECT e.expense_description, e.expense_date, e.cost
FROM expense e
JOIN member m ON e.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.position = 'Vice President';

final.sql:
SELECT e.expense_id, e.expense_description, e.expense_date, e.cost, e.approved
FROM expense e
JOIN member m ON e.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.position = 'Vice President';
